allow: Bash(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" "https://www.redfin.com/stingray/do/location-autocomplete?location=38+N+Harbison+Ave+Indianapolis+IN+46219&v=2" -H "User-Agent: Mozilla/5.0 \(Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64\) AppleWebKit/537.36" -H "Referer: https://www.redfin.com/")
